name: Westrock Coffee Co
business: Westrock Coffee Company is a leading integrated coffee, tea, flavors, extracts, and ingredients solutions provider. It provides coffee sourcing, supply chain management, product development, roasting, packaging, and distribution services to various industries worldwide. The company operates in two segments: Beverage Solutions and Sustainable Sourcing & Traceability.

exposures.sentence: Through this segment, we utilize our proprietary technology and digitally traceable supply chain to directly impact and improve the lives of our farming partners, provide tangible economic empowerment and emphasize environmental accountability and farmer literacy.

We provide products in a variety of packaging, including branded and private label coffee in bags, fractional packs, single serve cups, multi-serve bottles and ready-to-drink (RTD) bottles and cans, as well as extract solutions to be used in products such as cold brew and RTD offerings. Currently, we serve customers in the United States, Europe and Asia, through the retail, food service and restaurant, convenience store and travel center, non-commercial account, CPG, and hospitality industries.

providing coffee sourcing, supply chain management, product development, roasting, packaging, and distribution services to the retail, food service and restaurant, convenience store and travel center, non-commercial account, consumer packaged goods (CPG), and hospitality industries around the world.

We are increasingly dependent on information technology and our ability to process data in order to operate and sell our products, and if we are unable to protect against software and hardware vulnerabilities, service interruptions, data corruption, cyber-based attacks, ransomware or security breaches, or if we fail to comply with our commitments and assurances regarding the privacy and security of such data, our operations could be disrupted, our ability to provide our products could be interrupted, our reputation may be harmed and we may be exposed to liability and loss of customers and business.
Our proprietary technology links various points and systems to create traceability and connectivity on a global scale.

catalysts.event: Conway, Arkansas manufacturing facility became fully operational
catalysts.sentence: Construction on the facility began in late 2022 and the facility became fully operational in 2025.

catalysts.event: Issued $30.0 million 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031
catalysts.sentence: On November 4, 2025, the Company sold and issued in a private placement $30.0 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031.

catalysts.event: Entered into Fourth Amendment to Credit Agreement, increasing revolving facility commitments by $25.0 million
catalysts.sentence: On January 15, 2025, the Company entered into an Incremental Assumption Agreement and Amendment No. 4 (the Fourth Amendment) to the Credit Agreement... The Fourth Amendment... increased the amount of revolving facility commitments... by $25.0 million.

catalysts.event: Entered into equity method investment in Rwandan JV
catalysts.sentence: On April 1, 2025, the Company entered into an agreement with ETC Holdings SA (ECOM) that combines Westrock's and ECOM's Rwandan export operations... The Company contributed its ownership interest in Rwanda Trading Company (RTC) and $100,000 in cash in exchange for a 49.9% ownership interest in the Rwandan JV.

catalysts.event: Falcon renewed trade finance facility, increasing to $85.0 million
catalysts.sentence: On March 7, 2025, Falcon Coffees Limited (Falcon), a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company, renewed its working capital trade finance facility with multiple institutions. The facility size was increased from $75.0 million to $85.0 million.

catalysts.event: Falcon amended trade finance facility, increasing to $102.5 million
catalysts.sentence: On July 23, 2025, Falcon amended its working capital trade finance facility... The facility size was increased from $85.0 million to $102.5 million.

catalysts.event: Falcon amended responsAbility loan, extended maturity to March 31, 2028
catalysts.sentence: On December 16, 2025, Falcon amended its working capital trade finance facility with responsAbility Climate Smart Agriculture & Food Systems Fund. The amendment extended the maturity date on the then remaining outstanding balance of $3.5 million to March 31, 2028.

catalysts.event: Falcon obtained additional $2.9 million loan from responsAbility
catalysts.sentence: On December 16, 2025, Falcon obtained an additional $2.9 million loan with responsAbility Climate Smart Agriculture & Food Systems Fund. The facility will mature on December 31, 2028.

catalysts.event: Falcon renewed trade finance facility, increasing to $110.0 million
catalysts.sentence: On March 5, 2026, Falcon renewed its working capital trade finance facility with multiple institutions. The facility size was increased from $102.5 million to $110.0 million.
